articles.author: Colin Barras
articles.title: 18 million-year-old fossils of ape found in Africa, but in an unexpected place - Yahoo
articles.description: The ancestor of apes was long thought to come from East Africa, but newly discovered fossils in Egypt may prompt a rethink.
